channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Trump administration is detaining and questioning refugees already admitted to the US
How Americans plan to use their bigger tax refunds this year
item.description: Early tax refund data shows the typical check is so far 14% higher than a year ago. Here's what Americans are planning to do with the money.

item.title: Trump heads to Texas, where 3 supporters are battling it out in the Senate Republican primary
item.description: President Donald Trump is heading to Texas, his first trip after his State of the Union address. The Republican president plans to talk Friday about h...

item.title: WATCH: Man's mega snowman grows to 23 feet
item.description: ABC News' Danny New explains how a Massachusetts man is building a 23-foot snowman.

item.title: Over half of Americans say health care, vacation, new car are unaffordable: Poll
item.description: About two-thirds who donât own a home donât think theyâll be able to afford one.

item.title: Bill Clinton faces questions from House Oversight Committee in its Epstein probe
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton was set to take part in a closed door deposition with the House Oversight Committee as part of its probe into Jeffrey Ep...

item.title: Anthropic refuses to bend to Pentagon on AI safeguards as dispute nears deadline
item.description: A public showdown between the Trump administration and Anthropic is hitting an impasse as military officials demand the artificial intelligence compan...

item.title: WATCH: Does Gen Z need to party more?
item.description: UNC of Chapel Hill student Brian D'Aguanno discusses the op-ed he wrote for his school paper encouraging students to go out more.

item.title: JFK stowaway arrested after allegedly sneaking onto another flight, sources say
item.description: A woman convicted of stowing away on a flight out of JFK Airport in 2024 has allegedly done it again, this time at Newark Airport, sources say.

item.title: U.S. offers $10 million for capture of cartel bosses "The Frog" and "Achilles"
item.description: The U. S. is offering $5 million each for information on Rene Arzate Garcia and his brother Alfonso Arzate Garcia.

item.title: Pakistan declares "open war" with Afghanistan as airstrikes rock Kabul
item.description: Pakistan bombed major Afghan cities and declared "open war" after Afghanistan's Taliban rulers claimed an unprecedented aerial attack on Islamabad.

item.title: U.S. clears some diplomatic staff to leave Israel amid tension with Iran
item.description: As Trump leaves the threat of war on the table amid nuclear talks with Iran, the State Department urges Americans to "consider leaving Israel" while t...

item.title: Deadly shooting in Cuban waters highlights obsessions with counter-revolution as US pressure mounts
